official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound ping packet fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official ping body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns ping to packet id 0x3d.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the ping id to ClientboundPingPacket.
The official ping body is one big-endian int id.
The fixture uses a primitive constructor value and does not require initialized client/server state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded id, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove runtime pong response behavior, Play entry, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer runtime pong response behavior, Play entry, render readiness, or client-load completion.
